case_title: HEITMAN PROPERTIES, LTD. vs. KANARAKSANTI, WORRWUT et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEITMAN PROPERTIES, LTD. AS TO DEFENDANT KANARAKSANTI, WORRWUT TAIKAM, TOSSAPON
